# {{PRODUCT_NAME}}

{{ONE_LINE_DESCRIPTION}}

## Layout

This is a polyglot monorepo. Each area below is its own project with its own CLAUDE.md (link in the Notes column).

| Path | Tech | Purpose | Notes |
|------|------|---------|-------|
| `go/` | Go | Backend services, CLI tools, gRPC servers | [go/CLAUDE.md](./go/CLAUDE.md) |
| `flutter/` | Flutter / Dart | Cross-platform mobile + desktop app | [flutter/CLAUDE.md](./flutter/CLAUDE.md) |
| `admin/` | Next.js / TypeScript | Admin web console | [admin/CLAUDE.md](./admin/CLAUDE.md) |
| `proto/` | Protocol Buffers | gRPC schema definitions | [proto/CLAUDE.md](./proto/CLAUDE.md) |

_Delete rows that don't apply to this product. Add rows for product-specific areas (e.g. `pos/`, `api-dart/`, `mobile/`)._

## Standards

### No binaries in git

Compiled executables (Go binaries, Dart AOT snapshots, native libraries, .exe/.dll/.so/.dylib) **must not** be committed. They are blocked by the `monorepo-standards` plugin's pre-commit hook. Ship them as GitHub release artifacts:

```bash
go build -o dist/server ./go/cmd/server
gh release upload v1.2.3 dist/server
```

The threshold is 5 MB by default — large image / video assets belong in `assets/` (or per-area `assets/` subdirs), which is exempt.

To customise the rules: create `.devflow/no-binaries.yml`.

### Per-area CLAUDE.md

Each area in the Layout table has its own `CLAUDE.md` declaring local conventions (language version, build/test commands, framework-specific patterns). Claude Code automatically loads these when working inside that subtree.

### Path-filtered CI

`.github/workflows/<area>.yml` files use `paths:` filters so a change to `flutter/` doesn't run the `go/` test suite. See `.github/workflows/` for the active workflows.

## Build commands

| Area | Build | Test | Lint |
|------|-------|------|------|
| `go/` | `make -C go build` | `make -C go test` | `make -C go lint` |
| `flutter/` | `flutter --pub-cache=.pub-cache build apk` (run inside `flutter/`) | `flutter test` (inside `flutter/`) | `flutter analyze` |
| `admin/` | `pnpm --filter admin build` | `pnpm --filter admin test` | `pnpm --filter admin lint` |
| `proto/` | `make -C proto generate` | n/a | `buf lint` |

_Adjust per area. Each area's CLAUDE.md should restate its own commands for context._

## Conventions

- **Commits:** conventional-commits, scoped by area — `feat(go): ...`, `fix(flutter): ...`, `chore(proto): ...`
- **Branches:** `feat/<area>/<slug>`, `fix/<area>/<slug>`
- **PRs:** must pass area-scoped CI; touching multiple areas runs all matching workflows
- **Versioning:** product-level semver tags `vX.Y.Z`; per-area release notes in `CHANGELOG.md`
- **Dependencies:** pinned per area (go.mod, pubspec.yaml, package.json) — no global lockfile

## Critical warnings

- Don't commit secrets — use `op` (1Password) / env vars / GitHub Actions secrets.
- Don't commit generated code into `go/` from `proto/` unless the Makefile target is reproducible; prefer `buf generate` in CI.
- Don't bypass `monorepo-standards` hooks without filing a follow-up to fix the underlying issue.

## Health check

Run `/devflow:monorepo-doctor` periodically to validate that this Layout table matches reality.
